items.title: Notepat
items.visualDescription: A folded white user manual opens into a pointed shape, combining an illustrated player, a QR code, instructions, and circular keyboard diagrams.

items.title: Vigil Score
items.visualDescription: A matte-black folded packet is closed by a small circular silver seal.

items.title: Software as a Choreography
items.visualDescription: A white score sheet presents a grid of black silhouetted hands and arms paired with timing and movement marks.

items.title: Sonic Architecture
items.visualDescription: A single sheet combines printed columns, the large numbers 375 and 136, typewritten spatial commands, and a bold looping spiral diagram.

items.title: Cues for Losing Direction
items.visualDescription: A small black handheld card names the piece in pale condensed type.

items.title: Line Piece 1
items.visualDescription: A translucent white title sheet with a faint rainbow cast floats over the colored papers beneath it.

items.title: Biophonía
items.visualDescription: Blue, yellow, black, and beige cell-like forms branch across a white field and reorganize in the accompanying video.

items.title: A Cosmographic Score for Folding Back into the Kernel
items.visualDescription: A lavender square contains a luminous circular field and a small cross-shaped diagram of connected nodes.

items.title: Music for World Computers
items.visualDescription: A white typographic score carries a vertical vocabulary including awake, expand, oxygen, forest, cinnamon, and hammer.

items.title: The Radio Is an Altar: Portal
items.visualDescription: Translucent blue and white score cards show a target-like radio image, a small central figure or altar, and walking instructions around the edge.

verification.canonicalOrder: blue publication colophon and official closing-event page
verification.descriptions: draft; verify against page texts, presentations, email, and participant confirmation
